testPurpose.objective: Complete one four-player Inspector-expansion match through visible UI and verify the public Inspector marker, any result override, private-card isolation, and normalized terminal consistency.

successCriteria.description: The host enables Inspector and disables Juvenile, and every tab visibly mirrors the same settings.
A naturally dealt Inspector is played through its owning tab and its actor, target, public marker, and optional round-result override are consistent across all tabs.
Exact hands, draws, received cards, and actor-private results remain confined to the owning tab and owning agent Observation.
All four tabs complete the score-to-10 match and show the same normalized terminal result.

testPurpose.recommendationRationale: This is the smallest dedicated Inspector certification candidate: four isolated players, only the Inspector replacement enabled, and one complete production-time match. The scenario constrains only the visible expansion checkpoint; all card and target decisions remain autonomous. If no Inspector checkpoint occurs naturally, the Run lacks required evidence and cannot pass.
